title: Find Elements in a Contaminated Binary Tree
hints: Notice the values follow a strict arithmetic pattern based on position, not arbitrary data. The tree shape alone determines every node's value. Can you map a value back to its unique location in the tree?
Use binary representation. The path from root to any node is encoded in the bits of its value, excluding the leading one. This maps values directly to tree positions.
A value exists if and only if the path defined by its bits stays within the bounds of the given tree shape. Check if each step toward the leaf has a corresponding node in the input structure.
